purpose: Baseline for Android shell updates that load the hosted PWA build.

contentUpdatePolicy.webContent: Update by publishing GitHub Pages files and bumping data/update-manifest.json.
contentUpdatePolicy.serviceWorker: Bump CACHE_NAME and versioned URLs whenever runtime files change.
contentUpdatePolicy.nativeApkShell: Rebuild APK only when native shell code, permissions, signing, or Android package metadata changes.

releaseChecklist: Bump versioned imports and service worker cache.
Push to GitHub and verify Pages manifest URL.
Open installed Android shell and run update check.
